title: GUM Crayola Twistables Kids Toothbrush with Fun Twisting Head, Soft Bristles, Ages 3+ (Pack of 4) -230TT
description:
Product Description
Getting your kids excited about their daily tooth brushing routine requires more than just an ordinary kids toothbrush. Give them the fun and functional GUM Crayola Twistables Toothbrush for kids. It’s one of the best toothbrushes to keep kids engaged with bright and colorful handles, as well as a twistable head that can be extended from the toothbrush handle with a twist of the bottom green knob. When not in use, kids can twist the toothbrush back and store upside down in the included toothbrush cap. The cap doubles as a stand to keep the brush from rolling off the bathroom sink. This toothbrush also comes with soft, antibacterial bristles to further inhibit germ growth. The toothpaste sweet spot is highlighted by the colored bristles in the center of the compact head to teach children how much toothpaste they should be using. If you want to equip your little ones with a kids' toothbrush that will get them enthusiastic about their twice-daily tooth brushing routine, the GUM Crayola Twistable Toothbrush is what you need.
Manufacturer Contact Information
1-888-777-3116
features: EXTENDABLE TOOTHBRUSH HEAD: Twist the green knob on the handle to extend the compact toothbrush head for a fun and functional cleaning experience

KIDS TOOTHBRUSH CAP & STAND: Convenient antibacterial cap and stand to keep the brush from rolling off the sink. When it’s time to travel, pop the cap on top to cover the brush – perfect for road trips, camping, and sleepovers
CLINICALLY PROVEN BRISTLES: GUM Dome Trim brushes feature a raised center bristle design that provides greater contact with the tooth surface, while also reaching under the gum line
TOOTHPASTE SWEET SPOT: The compact head features colored centered soft bristles that teach children where to place their toothpaste and how much paste is needed
THE GUM MISSION: We are committed to helping people of all ages have stronger, healthier teeth, and gums by providing high quality, innovative oral care products that promote optimal dental health

reviews.title: Meh its ok
reviews.text: Its just a cheap what you would get for free at the kids dentist office kind of brush. Its totally flat but thats not a huge deal for me. The brush twisting gets my kids more into brushing their teeth but when I am brushing, the brush itself doesn't lock into place as as you are going around in their mouth and moving your hand it twists and doesn't stay in place. So I am typically adjusting at least once mid brush. Usually my kiddos are good about brushing but they have their days so its those days its really an issue for me. For the price it isn't worth it for me.

reviews.title: Great product! Decent price!
reviews.text: (Picture only shows three but there were four) adorable colors and tons of fun for my four year old. I thought they twisted all the way down but actually the head stays out then u use the stand as a cover which is what I needed since hes always knocking stuff off the bathroom sink. Will recommend to friends and family, and buy again in the future, really great product!

reviews.title: Best toothbrush
reviews.text: This is my second cybersonic toothbrush.  When my first cybersonic failed after many years of good service I ordered a less expensive name brand electric toothbrush and after 6 weeks threw it away and ordered my new cybersonic. Lesson learned.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text:
I've been using Cybersonic for decades. My teeth don't feel clean without it.
My second handle/rechargable battery needed replacing, so I decided to try the Cybersonic 3. I was surprised how much lighter it feels. And I think the oscillation is faster, but I didn't read up on it to check. Same great result - really clean teeth. The timing indicator isn't something I wanted/needed, but doesn't bother me. I has basically ignore it. Hope this handle lasts as long as my previous ones.
I really like the charging base. I discarded the side attachments to hold extra brushes and accessories, which left me with a sleek, minimalistic charging base.
So far I'm really happy with my purchase & highly recommend this product/brand/company.

reviews.title: Simply the best.
reviews.text: A system approach to oral hygiene that works for me, and the best oral health care product of its kind available. PERIOD!

reviews.title: It's a good toothbrush
reviews.text: It's a good toothbrush. I like that it vibrates every 30 seconds to help you keep track of the time. The brush tips are not too stiff as to be uncomfortable but stiff enough to get the job done.

reviews.title: Surprisingly fantastic!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:be0e9ab7d6ac2bbe6f1a5308058bc84a]] I have tried other electric toothbrushes but this one exceeded my expectations. My teeth felt clean and I love the built in timers. No more second guessing if you have brushed long enough with this one.

The toothbrush has a great battery life. It took several hours to fully charge but once the light indicator turned from red to green; I haven’t had to charge it again. I have brushed my teeth more than 6 times and the battery is still going strong.

Another great feature is the ability to choose cleaning speeds and (cleaning and whitening) modes with the push of a button. I really enjoyed the high frequency clean mode. When I use this toothbrush, my teeth and tongue feels amazing day and night.

And finally, I was delighted to get 5 refill brush tips. The brush tips have a small profile making it easier to brush my wisdom teeth and the bristles are gentle to my gums. This is a great toothbrush with so many features making it a good value for about $30.

reviews.title: Love this!
reviews.text:
I have no idea how they make a battery last so long! It’s a wonder for sure! I have not needed to charge this thing since I got it, and that was weeks ago.
I love all the color combos that goes with this. There’s black, pink, white… so you can actually blend it in with your bathroom decor.
I opted for the black because our new granite tops are very dark in color.
There are a bunch of attachments that I might never use, but appreciate!
And for this price?! This is an awesome price point. You can’t go wrong with this rechargeable tooth brush.

title: Colgate Total 360 4 Zone Whole Mouth Clean Manual Toothbrush, Medium
description: Colgate Total 360 4 Zone Whole Mouth Clean Manual Toothbrush, Medium

reviews.title: I really like this tooth brush
reviews.text:
I personally like a firm/hard bristled brush, but they don't seem to be available any longer. I ordered this "medium" 4-zone Colgate brush and found it to be very effective, and as close to firm as your going to get. Also, I really like the back of the brush, as it has an effective tongue cleaning pad that works well and feels great. I am now going to order some more of these while they're available.... I really like this tooth brush!
Note: This is a three pack, which is not in the bold description, but listed in the smaller font.

reviews.title: The flavor is WRONG, too expensive. Don’t buy!
reviews.text: The flavor is WRONG. bought this for ridiculous markup because we’ve been looking for bubble berry. NOT the same as description or picture. Flavor is bubble fruit, which my kids hate. This is double the money of just buying the toothbrush and paste separately. I wish I read more reviews. DONT BUY.

title: Pyhralke Schallcare Replacement Brush Heads Fit for Braun Oral b, Precision Heads Compatible with Oral-B Pro1000/9600/5000/3000/1500/Genius and Smart Electric Toothbrush(4pcs)
features: Compatible with Oral-B , Deep Sweep, SmartSeries, ProSeries, Triumph, Advance Power, ProfessionalCare, ProfessionalCare SmartSeries, Vitality Floss Action, Vitality Dual Clean, Vitality CrossAction, Vitality Precision Clean, Vitality Pro White, Vitality Sensitive, Vitality TriZone.(Attention: DO NOT compatible with oral b io)

Schallcare brush heads, the bristles with bacterial protective function, which can prevent bacterial growth on the brush. Also with strong cleaning function, which can removes up to 3x more plaque along the gum line than a traditional manual toothbrush.

Safe, healthy, and durable. Made with soft and flexible DuPont bristles and approved to meet official dental health and safety standards. At the same time, the production of brush heads uses a unique process technique, which greatly enhances the durability of the toothbrush head.

The slightly longer bristles at both ends are designed to easily clean the oral blind area--every side of the innermost teeth, also clean the gap of teeth, for comprehensive cleaning, fresh breath, prevention of tooth decay.

The soft to middle bristles protect teeth from harmful hard brushes and offer a more comfortable cleaning, better for your teeth and gum health. Side-to-side bristles sweep away plaque while the moving power tip penetrates hard to reach areas and fixed filaments help to whiten the enamel, reaching the most difficult areas.

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.

reviews.title: Good quality product.
reviews.text: Haven't had it long, however, I like the way my teeth feel after brushing.  Light touch buy effective cleaning. I have been a customer of Phillips Sonic for at least 26 years.  At my last dental cleaning, my hygienist also recommends Sonic.

reviews.title: More like the impossible-to-find-Fairywill
reviews.text: This replaces a previously-ordered wireless-charging brush.  Reason for this is that it's lighter, takes a common brushhead (and we have the soft-bristle heads from previously).  Has a plug-in charger, i.e. not wireless, so that works, easy to travel with, don't have to take an induction charger with us. Also, the 30-second indicator is easy to hear/feel.

reviews.title: I like it but room for improvement
reviews.text: It is a great product the reason l gave it a 3 star is l would prefer the brush to spin it just vibrates so l still have to brush and that damages the gums so not happy about that otherwise it holds a battery for at least 3 months or more before the next charge and is a powerful vibration but l will see what my dentist says when l do in on Wednesday after my 6 week check up from having a deep cleaning

reviews.title: I just got it so I can't comment on durability, but...
reviews.text: This is much less expensive than Oral B brush heads. I contacted Oral B to tell them I thought their brush heads are exorbitantly priced, but they blamed it on supply chain issues. So apparently Milos is somehow not affected by supply chain issues. It kinda makes it seem like Oral B's response was B.S. Anyway, these heads I bought fit my Oral B ProHealth toothbrush. It's kind of weird that the bristles aren't all flush with one another, but they seem to work fine. I don't care that the colors don't match with the toothbrush body.

reviews.title: Cheap off brand
reviews.text: You will go through these fast as they seem to wear down super quick. They came fast and were cheap I need them quick as we ran out but I won't order them again.

title: Oral-B 8000 Electric Toothbrush with Bluetooth Connectivity, White
description: Use the Oral-B App to seamlessly pair your Genius 8000 with a smartphone and you're on your way to brushing like your dentist recommends. The Oral-B Genius 8000 comes with Position Detection technology which uses Bluetooth technology, your smartphone, and facial recognition technology to provide you with real-time feedback about your brushing habits. The 360 Smarting with LED lights allows you to personalize your brushing experience with your choice of 12 colors. The Smarting works with the integrated timer and pressure sensor to provide you with visual feedback on brushing time and brushing pressure. Together, they help you ensure you brush for the recommended 2-minutes while making sure you brush with appropriate pressure to protect your gums from over-brushing. The premium Smart Travel Case lets you charge your brush and smartphone (via USB) at the same time while using only one wall plug. The Genius features 6 brushing modes so you can further customize your brushing experience based on your specific oral care goals. This highly advanced brush features a dentist-inspired round head that surrounds and cups each tooth with dynamic oscillating, rotating and pulsating movements to remove up to 500% more plaque than a regular manual toothbrush. Trust in the precision engineering of Braun and the dental expertise of Oral-B, the #1 brand used and recommended by dentists worldwide. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.
features: Position Detection to help you know where you've brushed, so you never miss a zone
Multicolor Smarting on electric toothbrush provides coaching on brushing time
Pressure sensor technology slows brush speed to protect gums
Rechargeable with 6 cleaning modes allow you to brush based on your needs

reviews.title: Tb
reviews.text: Stop working after two months. What a waste.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text:
for a top model priced as such, i was a disappointed in the feature set....no UV system to sterilize the brush head. Travel pack and main stand run on two different power systems...travel pack runs on 100-240v (universal) and main stand only runs on 110v (NA).

Does anyone know the point of the tongue mode being at the very bottom of the mode switch list? i brush my teeth and brush my tongue so the tongue mode should have been immediately after the regular brush mode

a few days use on a single charge. great build. grippy soft handle.

reviews.title: Some new features, brush works well.
reviews.text: This toothbrush is much like my old one, only this one is black. It does have a blue tooth thing that is so-so. It was a little cumbersome to get the app to work, (and had to get a new phone). The interaction between myself, the tooth brush, and the phone seems to be lacking. I envisioned real time brushing animation or something. This just times you through the selected areas. It is nice to get the bushing too hard feature well to know its there, and works. I miss the second speed my old one had this one only has one speed. I like that I can use my phone to help to remind me of my brushing responsibilities. The travel case is a nice feature as well. The design and function of this brush works well as does my old one. I was just expecting something a little more.

reviews.title: Very Good
reviews.text: Product arrived in time and exactly as presented on amazon

reviews.title: powerful toothbrush but a bit gimmicky
reviews.text:
I upgraded to this toothbrush from a vibrating-head type. The difference in cleaning-power feels dramatic. It has several different speeds for brushing teeth, gums, tongue, etc. By default, the light will blink and the toothbrush pause at certain intervals to ensure you spend enough time brushing different areas. This can be further customized with the Bluetooth unit and application. This is a neat novelty, and may be good for encouraging children to learn to brush correctly. To be honest though, when in a rush in the morning, I am not likely to take the extra step of using a phone app while brushing my teeth, and I also prefer not to take up another plug, as it’s not integrated with the charging base.

Overall I like the toothbrush a lot, but next time around, I would likely get the less expensive model without the phone accessories.

title: Philips Sonicare Genuine A3 Premium All-in-One Replacement Toothbrush Heads, 2 Brush Heads, White, HX9092/65
description: The Philips Sonicare Premium All-in-One brush head combines plaque removal, gum health and whitening into one brush head, so you don't have to choose any longer. Designed to work with all click-on Sonicare models, these brush heads remove up to 20x more plaque than a manual toothbrush while gently improving gum health up to 15x in six weeks (vs. a manual toothbrush). Subscribe & Save on genuine Philips Sonicare brush head replacements and save up to 15%.

reviews.title: Best of the Philips brushes
reviews.text:
I've been using Sonicare for 20 years and I find these A3 heads do the best at cleaning my teeth. The C3 are not too far behind, and the C1 are not far behind those. I just use the old rubbing the tongue on my teeth technique, but with the A3, I seem to go longer before I feel like I need a teeth cleaning at the dentist.
I've also used multiple 3rd party heads and none of them even come close to cleaning like the Philips heads. It's just too bad these things are so expensive, I'll probably stick to the C1 heads unless I see the A3 heads go on sale.

reviews.title: My hygienist noticed a difference!
reviews.text: Used to use the C3s. They are smaller and a bit less comfortable to use than this variant. The main winning point is that my hygienist said "what are you doing differently, your mouth looks way better than usual." I take that as an endorsement, and will continue to use these!

reviews.title: It’s a brush head
reviews.text: It’s a brush head

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: These are great toothbrush heads and fit my sonicare perfectly. Cleans teeth well. Would recommend.

reviews.title: Overpriced vs C2
reviews.text: I don’t know what a $15 replacement brush head needs to do to earn 5 stars but this just doesn’t blow me away. I typically buy the C2 replacements, I’ve also used C1 and C3. This is comparable to C3 it’s soft and gives a good clean. I can tell a difference between this and C1 or C2 but when I was using even C1 (which feels harder and I don’t like this one as much C2 is my go to) I didn’t have a cavity and my dentist said I was looking good. I do like that this head tells me when to swap out (C1 doesn’t) but $15 for a replacement is steep considering my toothbrush was $30. I will say after my second root canal I made the switch to a Phillips soniccare and since switching to sonic care from a traditional toothbrush I haven’t had any cavities. So I think using the soniccare with whatever heads you can afford is great for your dental health!

features: BULK WHEAT STRAW TRAVEL TOOTHBRUSH SET - 25 Mini travel toothbrushes made from planet conscious wheat straw. This bulk pack is great for families and frequent travelers!
KINDNESS FOR THE PLANET - Move away from plastic and say hello to sustainable toothbrushes designed with the planet in mind. Our zero waste toothbrush is made from wheat plant stems.

reviews.title: Convenient
reviews.text: I was interested to try these toothbrushes because I thought they might be good for camping, travel, etc. I have used a couple of them and I will definitely use the rest, but I probably won't purchase them in the future. The design seems a bit wasteful/odd, as the handle is quite thick and sturdy but rather short. It is hard for me to keep my grip as I brush because the handle is so short, and my hands are not even that big. I feel like I don't get as good of a cleaning/scrubbing because of the short handle. I think the manufacturer could make the handle a little less thick, but longer. I think it would be more effective if that were the case. Also, the taste is pretty bland and it doesn't leave a "fresh" taste (like a fresh minty taste) in my mouth. I know my teeth are probably clean, but it just doesn't feel or taste like I'm getting as good of a cleaning as I do with my regular-sized toothbrush and minty toothpaste. For a one or two day trip, they would be fine, but for anything longer, I'd want to bring a standard toothbrush.

reviews.title: Good for travel!

They would just wander around the house chomping on them throughout the day, if I allowed them too but, I know they aren't suppose to so I don't let them. :)  No bristles seem to be falling out and we have been using them for about a month at this point.  The bristles are quite soft and seem to be gentle enough for the toddler aged child.

reviews.title: tried 2 batteries for 3762 model & none charge
reviews.text:
I have 3762 model of toothbrush which is compatible based on description of product. I needed to replace the battery because original one would last for 1 week and require frequent charging..
I thought that it will be more convinient to get this battery than waiting on replacement that would be shipped from France.. However, first battery that I got was not charging at all. I soldered everything correctly, replaced original battery & was attempting to charge it for 24hrs - no luck. It wouldn't even start, the second I would press the power button it would just show red indicator right away..
And then I decided to give it another try and get replacement battery - I thought that might be I got a defective one.. I soldered 2nd battery on, and got same results.
I will be returning both while I'm waiting on JDK battery to arrive from France.
And just to mention, it seemed like pins are probably 2 times thiner than pins that original battery had. However, I didn't have any problems with them - if you're careful enough you won't break it.. but that wasn't my issue with this product.

The replacement battery required multiple charges before it started acting normal. maybe this battery was stored without a charge for too long but it arrived with no charge at all. After 5 times being recharged it performs as a new battery that I had expected.

reviews.title: Edit: Good for my 2 year old
reviews.text:
I realize it says it's a kids toothbrush but it's huge! It's bigger than a regular sized brush for adults. I intended this for my 2 year old for Christmas. It's my fault for not looking at details. I've been searching for an Olaf one and this was on sale. I have not tried it but will update when we do...

Update: I gave this to my daughter early because she saw Olaf. It does fit in her mouth and the on/off buttons are easy for her to push. It's her favorite color, purple. She actually brushes her teeth. Well the toothbrush does the work! I don't see a timer on it. So far, the battery is doing fine. My biggest concern is replacing the head. It's already looking like I should replace.

title: Philips Sonicare 4100 Electric Rechargeable Power Toothbrush, Black, with Genuine Optimal Plaque Control Replacement Toothbrush Heads, White, 3 Pack
description: Remove plaque and experience a deep, effective clean with Sonicare technology, removing up to 5x-7x more plaque vs. a manual toothbrush. Sonicare technology gently pulses water between your teeth, for a month's worth of manual brushing in just 2 minutes. The QuadPacer lets you know when you've spent the optimal amount of time on each section of your mouth while the SmarTimer signals when your 2 minutes is up. The pressure sensor flashes red to remind you to ease off, helping to prevent gum recession, while the 2 intensity settings ensure a comfortable clean that’s right for you. Going electric might feel like a big step, but with this brush you’re in safe hands. Its slim ergonomic design and familiar-shaped head gives you everything you need for an effective clean. The kit includes 1 Philips Sonicare 4100 electric toothbrush, 1 Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush head and 1 USB charger (wall adaptor not included). An additional 3 pack of Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush heads included.
